ddls:
CREATE TABLE "brands" (
  "brand_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each brand */,
  "brand_name" TEXT /* Name of the brand */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the brand */,
  "website" TEXT /* URL of the brand's official website */,
  "contact_email" TEXT /* Email address for brand support or inquiries */,
  "logo_url" TEXT /* URL of the brand's logo image */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("brand_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "models" (
  "model_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each model */,
  "brand_id" INTEGER /* ID of the brand that offers the model */,
  "model_name" TEXT /* Name of the model */,
  "type" TEXT /* Type of the model (e.g., poly, mono) */,
  "power_output" INTEGER /* Power output of the model in watts */,
  "price_per_watt" REAL /* Price per watt of the model in euros */,
  "warranty_years" INTEGER /* Number of years the warranty is valid */,
  "efficiency" REAL /* Efficiency of the solar panel in percentage */,
  "weight" REAL /* Weight of the solar panel in kilograms */,
  "dimensions" TEXT /* Dimensions of the solar panel */,
  "temperature_coefficient" REAL /* Temperature coefficient of the solar panel in %/°C */,
  "material" TEXT /* Material used in the solar panel */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("model_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_models_brand_id FOREIGN KEY ("brand_id") REFERENCES brands ("brand_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "inventory" (
  "inventory_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each inventory entry */,
  "model_id" INTEGER /* ID of the model in the inventory */,
  "quantity" INTEGER /* Quantity of the model in stock */,
  "availability" TEXT /* Availability status of the model (e.g., available, out of stock) */,
  "reorder_level" INTEGER /* Quantity at which a reorder should be initiated */,
  "last_reorder_date" TEXT /* Date of the last reorder */,
  "expected_restock_date" TEXT /* Expected date when the inventory will be restocked */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("inventory_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_inventory_model_id FOREIGN KEY ("model_id") REFERENCES models ("model_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "orders" (
  "order_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each order */,
  "customer_id" INTEGER /* ID of the customer who placed the order */,
  "order_date" TEXT /* Date the order was placed */,
  "total_cost" REAL /* Total cost of the order in euros */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the order (e.g., processing, shipped, delivered) */,
  "billing_address" TEXT /* Billing address for the order */,
  "shipping_address" TEXT /* Shipping address for the order */,
  "notes" TEXT /* Any additional notes or comments about the order */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("order_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_orders_customer_id FOREIGN KEY ("customer_id") REFERENCES customers ("customer_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "order_items" (
  "order_item_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each order item */,
  "order_id" INTEGER /* ID of the order that the item belongs to */,
  "model_id" INTEGER /* ID of the model that is part of the order */,
  "quantity" INTEGER /* Quantity of the model in the order */,
  "unit_price" REAL /* Unit price of the model in the order */,
  "discount" REAL /* Discount applied to the order item */,
  "total_price" REAL /* Total price of the order item after discount */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("order_item_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_order_items_model_id FOREIGN KEY ("model_id") REFERENCES models ("model_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_order_items_order_id FOREIGN KEY ("order_id") REFERENCES orders ("order_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "customers" (
  "customer_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each customer */,
  "customer_name" TEXT /* Name of the customer */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the customer */,
  "phone" TEXT /* Phone number of the customer */,
  "company_name" TEXT /* Name of the company the customer represents */,
  "address" TEXT /* Physical address of the customer */,
  "city" TEXT /* City of the customer */,
  "state" TEXT /* State of the customer */,
  "zip_code" TEXT /* Zip code of the customer */,
  "country" TEXT /* Country of the customer */,
  "customer_type" TEXT /* Type of customer (e.g., retail, wholesale) */,
  "registered_date" TEXT /* Date the customer registered with the company */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("customer_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "prices" (
  "price_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each price entry */,
  "model_id" INTEGER /* ID of the model that the price applies to */,
  "quantity" INTEGER /* Quantity of the model that the price applies to */,
  "price_per_watt" REAL /* Price per watt of the model for the specified quantity */,
  "valid_from" TEXT /* Date from which the price is valid */,
  "valid_to" TEXT /* Date until which the price is valid */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("price_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_prices_model_id FOREIGN KEY ("model_id") REFERENCES models ("model_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "discounts" (
  "discount_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each discount entry */,
  "quantity" INTEGER /* Quantity of the model that the discount applies to */,
  "discount_percentage" REAL /* Percentage discount for the specified quantity */,
  "valid_from" TEXT /* Date from which the discount is valid */,
  "valid_to" TEXT /* Date until which the discount is valid */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("discount_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "shipping" (
  "shipping_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each shipping entry */,
  "order_id" INTEGER /* ID of the order that the shipping information applies to */,
  "shipping_date" TEXT /* Date the order was shipped */,
  "expected_delivery_date" TEXT /* Expected delivery date of the order */,
  "carrier" TEXT /* Shipping carrier used */,
  "tracking_number" TEXT /* Tracking number for the shipment */,
  "shipping_cost" REAL /* Cost of shipping the order */,
  "shipping_address" TEXT /* Shipping address for the order */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("shipping_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_shipping_order_id FOREIGN KEY ("order_id") REFERENCES orders ("order_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "payments" (
  "payment_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each payment entry */,
  "order_id" INTEGER /* ID of the order that the payment applies to */,
  "payment_date" TEXT /* Date the payment was made */,
  "payment_method" TEXT /* Method of payment (e.g., credit card, bank transfer) */,
  "amount" REAL /* Amount of the payment */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the payment (e.g., paid, pending, failed) */,
  "transaction_id" TEXT /* Transaction ID from the payment processor */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("payment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_payments_order_id FOREIGN KEY ("order_id") REFERENCES orders ("order_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "reviews" (
  "review_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each review entry */,
  "model_id" INTEGER /* ID of the model that the review applies to */,
  "customer_id" INTEGER /* ID of the customer who wrote the review */,
  "review_date" TEXT /* Date the review was written */,
  "rating" INTEGER /* Rating given by the customer (e.g., 1-5 stars) */,
  "review_text" TEXT /* Text of the review */,
  "verified_purchase" INTEGER /* Whether the review is from a verified purchase */,
  "review_title" TEXT /* Title of the review */,
  "helpful_votes" INTEGER /* Number of helpful votes the review has received */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("review_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_reviews_model_id FOREIGN KEY ("model_id") REFERENCES models ("model_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_reviews_customer_id FOREIGN KEY ("customer_id") REFERENCES customers ("customer_id")
)
